d:
Vetro collection is a minimal, privacy-focused media manager for organizing and managing movies, TV shows, anime, and other content.

The app follows a local-first approach and works fully offline without requiring an account. All user data is stored locally and remains under full user control.

Originally created as an anime tracker, Vetro evolved into a flexible media manager for different types of content libraries.

Features:
- Fully offline support
- No mandatory accounts or tracking
- Optional cloud sync
- Clean architecture (MVI)
- Reactive data layer (Flow + SQLDelight)
- Advanced search (API-based and image recognition)
